Network segmentation, VLANs,     firewall rules, and zero-trust principles. Secure     Messaging: Encryption, authentication,     and integrity checks on messaging systems. Message filtering and     sanitization for cross-domain compliance. Container     Security: Hardened Docker/Kubernetes     deployments, RBAC, Pod Security Policies, image scanning. Performance     & Reliability: Low-latency design,     fault-tolerant architectures, and secure failover strategies. Compliance     & Auditing: Logging,     monitoring, and evidence collection for security accreditation. Qualifications Experience: 5–8+ years in software     engineering, preferably with 2–3+ years in secure networked     systems or Cross Domain Solutions environments. Programming: Proficiency in one or more     of: Java (Spring/Spring Boot), Go, C#/.NET, Node.js     (TypeScript/JavaScript), or Python for application components. Proficiency in C/C++, Go, or Rust for     performance-critical components will be a plus Cybersecurity Knowledge Containers     & Cloud: Experience     with Kubernetes, Docker, and secure container lifecycle management. Messaging     Systems: Hands-on     with messaging systems such as, but not limited to, RabbitMQ, Kafka, or Redis in secure,     high-availability deployments. Mindset: Strong security-first approach, attention to     detail, and ability to work in regulated environments. title: MTS – Member of Technical Staff, HIG-HBM Product System Engineering (Media Health Manufacturing)
description: As a key leader within High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) Product Engineering Media Health team, you will spearhead and develop a high performing team driving Media Health Manufacturing and activities for Micron’s latest HBM products, both on DRAM and Interface die and a stacked product. You will lead a portfolio of Best-In-Class Next Generation HBM Product focused on the critical KPI’s Quality, Cost, Cycle Time and Scale. This include lead the manufacturing test flow development and validation, improve the device/stacked yield with most optimized extrinsic and intrinsic reliability through in depth circuit debug, test coverage optimization and strategy innovation, test time improvement for manufacturing flow and drive the DFT (design for test) strategy to stage new ideas to improve cost, cycle time and quality. You will also collaborate with cross functional team  (Fab, Product Leads, Design, Technology Development, Design, Test Solution Engineering etc) with diverse expertise to achieve both strategic and tactical objectives and stay ahead on technology and product leadership. The future of HBM are exciting and dynamics. Micron is seeking experienced individuals that find technical challenges engaging and invigorating. Responsibilities: Optimized Test Coverage: The responsibility of ensuring optimized test coverage on all current and future HIG HBM design architectures and process nodes is a technical aspect of this role. This is crucial for maintaining the effectiveness and efficiency in high-volume manufacturing. Product Development and Validation: This role is pivotal in developing, validating, characterizing, and qualifying Micron’s next-generation HBM products. Ensuring that these products are reliable and meet the necessary standards is a technical task that directly impacts the market readiness of the products. Support for New Product Design Validation: The role provides support for design verification and in-depth circuit of new products using CAD tools and Verilog simulations. This technical support is crucial for the development of new products and technologies. Yield Improvement and Cost Reduction: The role involves technical tasks like improving manufacturing test yields (Specifically related to Device Issues from the DRAM, Interface and Stacked Die Yield), reducing test time, and resolving yield-related issues. These activities are critical for cost reduction and meeting yield targets. Root Cause and Resolution of Manufacturing Test Flow Issue, Qual and RMA Device Issues Promotion of Innovation: The role involves promoting innovation and driving for changes that will provide Micron with a technical advantage over its competition. This is vital for maintaining Micron’s competitive edge in the market. Mentorship and Development of Others: The role involves actively developing and mentoring others. This is important for the growth and development of the team and the organization. Project Management: Developing project management skills within the team ensures efficient execution of projects, leading to timely delivery of technological solutions. Technical Decision Making: The role involves making final decisions on risk analysis and project prioritization. These decisions directly impact the direction of technological development. Cross-Functional Collaboration: This role necessitates collaboration with various cross-functional teams such as Fab, HBM Technology Development, HBM Design, System Development, and Quality/Reliability team. This collaboration is vital for the holistic development and shipping of end products. Requirements Bachelors/Masters Electrical and Electronics Engineering Degree with 8+ years of experience in the semiconductor industry. Product Engineering experience is preferred. Demonstrating Strong Leadership Skills and Technical Skills, especially in problem solving with root cause understanding and solution space through in depth circuit analysis. Good knowledge of statistics and data analysis tools and scripting. Dedicated and highly motivated with a flexible approach towards adapting to different roles in a dynamic working environment (from leading the team to leading technical programs). Proven track record of collaborative work within/across teams to address sophisticated business and engineering problems. Strong sense of responsibility and accountability towards assigned role with professional work ethic. Excellent communication and presentation skills. Passionate about people leadership, with a drive toward ongoing learning and development in this area. Work on site in Singapore with international travel opportunity to US, Taiwan and Japan.

title: Analog Mixed Signal Circuit Design Engineer
description: THE ROLE: The focus of this role is to plan, build, and execute the verification of new and existing features for AMD’s SERDES IP, resulting in no bugs in the final design. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Circuit design of wireline transceiver building blocks (PLL, clock distribution, receiver front-end, transmitter front-end, serializer, deserializer, etc.) Conduct peer reviews of circuit design and verification results Working with validation team to evaluate silicon results PREFERRED EXPERIENCE: experience with high speed analog design with blocks like ADC, PLL, clock distribution, receiver front-end, transmitter front-end, serializer, deserializer. Experience with latest process technologies like 7nm or below Finfet technology. ACADEMIC CREDENTIALS: Bachelors/Masters/Phd Degree in Electronic Engineering Fresh Graduates are welcomed

title: Process Executive
description: Design, improve, and automate operational processes to enhance efficiency, service quality, compliance, and customer experience. Support business operations by translating operational needs into practical process improvements, digital workflows, and data-driven solutions, while ensuring processes are scalable, compliant, and aligned with organisational objectives, governance, and standards. Change Management & Governance Support Support the end-to-end Change Management process by coordinating, tracking, and validating change requests impacting Enterprise customers. Perform governance pre-checks to ensure change requests comply with change guidelines, controls, and approval requirements. Support CAB meetings by preparing materials, validating data, tracking actions, and following up on decisions. Assist in monitoring compliance to change processes and highlighting risks, gaps, or non-compliances. Support the maintenance and continuous improvement of Change Management tools and trackers. Process Improvement & Optimisation Analyse operational workflows to identify inefficiencies, risks, and improvement opportunities. Design and implement to-be processes that improve productivity, turnaround time, and service quality. Standardise processes to ensure consistency, repeatability, and SLA adherence. Support service improvement initiatives with process analysis and operational inputs. Automation & Digital Enablement Design, develop, and maintain automated solutions using SharePoint, Power Automate, Power Apps, Excel (Power Query, macros, VBA), and SQL-based queries. Automate reporting, approvals, tracking, and notifications to reduce manual dependency and errors. Ensure automation solutions are scalable, maintainable, auditable, and aligned with governance standards. Support user testing, data validation, rollout, and post-implementation support. Skills for Succcess: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Information Systems, Engineering, or related discipline At least 3–6 years of experience in operations, process improvement, change management support, or compliance-related roles within a structured or regulated environment Data & Automation Tools: Strong working knowledge of Excel (advanced formulas, Power Query) and workflow automation concepts Process & Governance Application: Working knowledge of process mapping, SOP documentation, RACI, controls, and governance requirements Reporting & Analysis: Ability to design operational reports, dashboards, and trackers, including data extraction and validation Good to have Professional certifications such as ITIL Foundation or Lean / Six Sigma (Yellow Belt) Experience supporting Change Management (CAB, CR, governance), or enterprise operations Experience with Power Apps, VBA/macros, Power Query, and Power BI. Experience using SharePoint for document management, version control, metadata, and access control to ensure data governance and confidentiality. Exposure to basic project management activities, including task coordination, tracking, and supporting project delivery. Experience facilitating discussions or workshops to clarify requirements or drive alignment.

title: Mechanic
description: Job Summary: We are seeking a skilled and experienced Heavy Equipment / PVD Machine Mechanic to support the maintenance and repair of Prefabricated Vertical Drain (PVD) installation machines used in ground improvement projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for troubleshooting, servicing, and overhauling hydraulic and mechanical systems to ensure safe, reliable, and efficient machine operations on-site. Experience with modern diagnostic tools, heavy-duty engines, and hydraulic systems is highly desirable. Key Responsibilities: Perform preventive maintenance, servicing, and overhauls on PVD installation machines and related heavy equipment. Diagnose and repair mechanical faults and breakdowns in real-time, ensuring minimal downtime. Inspect and maintain critical components including mast, drain cutter head, hydraulic rams, winch systems, clamps, and undercarriage/track systems. Oversee the performance of hydraulic pumps, hoses, cylinders, and power units, ensuring optimal pressure and flow. Carry out engine-related works such as component replacement, alignment, and performance testing. Use advanced diagnostic and calibration tools to monitor and troubleshoot machine systems. Support assembly, disassembly, and mobilization of PVD rigs when required. Maintain detailed service logs, inspection reports, and spare parts inventory. Ensure compliance with site safety requirements and project quality standards. Recommend and implement improvements for higher machine reliability and operational efficiency. Requirements: Education & Experience: Technical diploma or certification in Mechanical Engineering, Heavy Equipment Maintenance, or related discipline. Minimum 3–5 years’ experience working with PVD rigs, heavy equipment, or ground improvement machinery. Solid background in hydraulic systems, winch operations, and heavy-duty engine servicing (overhauls, replacements, calibration). Familiarity with modern diagnostic software and electronic service tools (for engines, hydraulics, and electrical systems). Skills & Competencies: Strong expertise in hydraulic and mechanical troubleshooting. Ability to interpret technical drawings, hydraulic schematics, and service manuals. Hands-on experience in engine servicing, system calibration, and component replacement. Familiarity with soil improvement or ground engineering methods (e.g., vertical drains, vibro-compaction) is an advantage. Strong commitment to safety and compliance with heavy machinery operations. Independent problem-solving ability, with a proactive and detail-oriented mindset. Preferred Background: Experience in international heavy equipment service environments or with OEM-authorised service procedures. Exposure to diagnostic tool usage, hydraulic calibration, and complete engine replacement/overhaul projects.

title: Application and Support Engineer
description: POSITION SUMMARY The ideal candidate shall work alongside with sales team to provide supports on customer’s vision-based solution for automation and inspection systems. Responsibilities include collaborating with clients to assess needs, developing image processing algorithms, selecting appropriate hardware/software, and ensuring system integration. The role involves troubleshooting, system calibration, and testing to meet quality standards. Expertise in image processing, optical systems, and machine learning is essential, along with proficiency in imaging software like Zebra Matrox Imaging. Strong problem-solving, technical support skills, and effective communication are key, with occasional travel for client installations, training, and maintenance. ESSENTIAL ACCOUNTABILITIES · Assist customers in hardware selection and system configurations of machine vision systems. · Identify and resolve technical issues, minimizing downtime. · Develop machine vision applications. Manage application projects, ensure timely completion. · Conduct Vision Education Program training to customer. · Write application reports, user manuals, application notes, etc. · Work closely with sales, product marketing, R&D and customer support teams. · Stay updated with industry trends and maintain industry knowledge. · Perform other duties as requested. QUALIFICATIONS · Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science, or a related field · Proven experience in machine vision technology · Strong knowledge of machine vision software frameworks and libraries, such as OpenCV, Matrox Imaging Library (MIL), Halcon, etc. · Experience in programming languages will be a plus such as C++, C#, .Net, Python for machine vision application development · Familiarity with industrial automation, robotics, and manufacturing processes is highly desirable. · Committed attitude and positive approach, punctuality, and reliability. · A keen interest in continuing to develop in machine vision industry.

title: Technical Program Manager, Global Network Acquisition, Longhaul Planning - Singapore
description: Product area Behind everything our users see online is the architecture built by the Technical Infrastructure team to keep it running. From developing and maintaining our data centers to building the next generation of Google platforms, we make Google's product portfolio possible. We're proud to be our engineers' engineers and love voiding warranties by taking things apart so we can rebuild them. We keep our networks up and running, ensuring our users have the best and fastest experience possible. Job description Google's projects, like our users, span the globe and require managers to keep the big picture in focus while being able to dive into the unique engineering challenges we face daily. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you lead complex, multi-disciplinary engineering projects using your engineering expertise. You plan requirements with internal customers and usher projects through the entire project lifecycle. This includes managing project schedules, identifying risks and clearly communicating them to project stakeholders. You're equally at home explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical trade-offs in product development with engineers. Using your extensive technical and leadership expertise, you manage various Engineering-specific programs and teams. Qualifications Job responsibilities Implement communications standards across a portfolio of programs including executive and key partner communications. Establish a reliable and visible cadence for program reviews, decision-making, prioritization, and resource stewardship (effective deployment of machine and people resources). Lead a governance structure that drives effective executive decision-making. Ensure governance structure effectively exposes and mitigates dependencies. Identify change management opportunities that increase program velocity and which affect multiple teams. Apply governance over change management to ensure it’s used effectively. Define/manage a program portfolio solving problems that have high business impact for the organization and product areas. Minimum qualifications Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience. 8 years of experience in program management. 5 years of experience in leadership role with/without direct reports. Preferred qualifications 8 years of experience managing cross-functional/team projects.

title: Regional Market Manager
description: Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition CIMC RAFFLES OFFSHORE (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD. Job Summary You will develop regional market customers and establish the sales network layout for the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and international markets, driving strategic growth and fostering long-term business relationships in the offshore engineering and shipbuilding sectors. Responsibilities Develop and implement strategic sales network layouts tailored to the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and international markets by conducting in-depth research on regional needs and cultural contexts. Collect and analyze market industry data, including laws, regulations, tax policies, and environmental factors, to identify market trends, target customers, competitor activities, and optimize pricing strategies. Gather and evaluate customer information through diverse channels such as internet research, emails, exhibitions, site visits, and direct communication to identify and pursue potential cooperation opportunities. Build and maintain strong relationships with regional market customers by organizing and participating in visits and receptions, presenting company capabilities and products, understanding customer needs, and delivering customized service plans. Assist in qualifying potential customers by reviewing compliance with local regulations to ensure eligibility for project bidding. Support the formulation of project bidding strategies by reviewing bidding documents for alignment with customer requirements and local regulations, and contribute to determining final bid pricing. Participate in contract negotiations to ensure business terms comply with local laws and market regulations while safeguarding company interests. Review contract terms to assess execution risks, coordinate with relevant departments, and facilitate contract signing. Organize project reviews to summarize experiences and lessons learned, ensuring continuous improvement and smooth progress of future projects. Lead project kick-off meetings and coordinate the transfer of bidding project documents to legal and project management teams for execution. Maintain customer relationships throughout project execution, manage contract payments and changes, and participate in project budget monitoring and control. Coordinate cross-functional teams including technology, procurement, project management, and legal departments to ensure successful bidding and negotiation outcomes. Demonstrate high self-discipline, resilience under stress, and self-motivation to sustain performance in high-intensity negotiations and long-term relationship management. Uphold a transparent, trustworthy, and stable professional attitude to foster consistent business results. Required competencies and certifications Minimum 5 years of experience in offshore engineering or shipbuilding industries with practical project operation expertise. At least 2 years of experience in regional market expansion with familiarity of business environments and cultural differences in target regions. Deep understanding of the upstream, midstream, and downstream industry chain, EPCIC general contracting models, and oil and gas market trends. Proficiency in independently building key customer maps for regional markets. Comprehensive knowledge of international bidding processes (RFQ/EOI → Clarification → Technical/Communication Proposal → Final Offer) and all major engineering life cycle stages to anticipate and mitigate execution risks during business development. Understanding of offshore engineering equipment design, construction processes, and industry standards for FPSO, FLNG, FPU, Jack-up, WHP, and PP. Familiarity with EPCIC contract frameworks and ability to identify key business risks including liquidated damages, letters of intent, interface issues, changes, tax, insurance, and local compliance. Capability to identify genuine project opportunities through exhibitions, consultants, partners, and internal resources. Preferred competencies and qualifications Proven ability to coordinate multiple departments to complete bidding and negotiation processes effectively. Strong professional attitude characterized by transparency, trustworthiness, and stability under pressure.
